tagline: Find out how many famous people you know
description: From the 15,000 most iconic figures in world history
method: Adaptive testing algorithm — the same one used in IQ tests. With just 100 answers, it pinpoints your level and precisely estimates your knowledge across all 15,000 figures.

features.adaptive: Adaptive test that adjusts to you
features.noLogin: No sign-up required — start right now
features.withAccount: Create an account to save your progress and continue later

onboarding.title: Where are you from?
onboarding.subtitle: This helps us pick figures you're more likely to recognize

quiz.title: Test coming soon
quiz.body: Thanks for your interest. We're building a database of 15,000 figures and the adaptive algorithm. Launching in the coming weeks.
